question.text: When did the provisions of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002 come into force?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The PMLA 2002 was enacted in 2002 but its provisions came into force on July 1, 2005. **The Trap:** Option A (January 1, 2003) is tempting because the Act was passed in 2002 and one might assume it took effect shortly after. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series III-A and III-B test the effective date of PMLA. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** There was a 3-year gap between PMLA's enactment (2002) and implementation (July 2005) — this time was needed to set up the institutional framework including FIU-IND.
